name: acid-prophet
description: Spec-driven development for Codex: constitution → spec → audit with Phase -1 gates → implementation plan with typed contracts → acceptance checklist → drift check. Optional Linear handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Turn raw ideas into reviewed specs
interface.longDescription: Acid Prophet is a spec-driven development pipeline for Codex. Ratify project articles into a constitution. Turn ideas into specs through one-question-at-a-time clarification with explicit [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers when uncertain. Audit specs against SDD structure, codebase reality, and Phase -1 gates (simplicity, anti-abstraction, acceptance-defined, clarifications-resolved, constitution). Expand ratified specs into plans with typed contracts and quickstart scenarios. Derive acceptance checklists for QA. Detect drift between branch diffs and the linked spec. Hand off to Linear Devotee for Linear project creation when handoffEligible.
defaultPrompt: Use Acid Prophet to turn this feature idea into a reviewed spec.
Use Acid Prophet to structure this project before creating Linear work.
